tracks.meaning: to construct or erect a structure such as a building, bridge, or other physical structure
to construct or create something gradually or progressively
the physical form, structure, or shape of a person's body
to develop or establish a company, brand, or business enterprise
to strengthen or develop a skill, confidence, or positive quality over time
to compile or create executable software from source code
muscular physique or physical development, especially in bodybuilding
to accumulate or increase in amount or intensity gradually
to develop fitness, strength, or momentum in preparation for athletic performance
to establish rapport, trust, or a relationship with someone
